sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Keysight launches lab-grade RF analyzer for field tests
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies has introduced its N99xxD-Series, a new handheld RF analyzer designed for field tests. This device offers lab-grade accuracy with 120 MHz of gap-free IQ streaming, allowing engineers to capture and analyze wideband signals in challenging environments. The N99xxD-Series also includes integrated AI capabilities for automatic classification of wireless standards, enhancing efficiency and reducing analysis time.

feed.title: Plaintiffs Drop Appeal of Home Depot ERISA Case
feed.summary: Plaintiffs have abandoned their appeal of a district court's decision that The Home Depot Inc. did not breach its fiduciary duties regarding retirement plan forfeitures. The district court had dismissed the case with prejudice, consistent with a trend of similar ERISA cases distinguishing between fiduciary and settlor roles of plan sponsors. The Home Depot FutureBuilder Plan is a significant plan with over 446,000 participants and $14 billion in assets.

feed.title: Can FICO Stock Rebound From Here?
feed.summary: FICO stock is currently trading within a historically reliable support zone between $1,683 and $1,860, which has previously led to significant rebounds, with an average peak gain of 22.8%. Strong fundamentals, impressive Q4 FY25 earnings, and solid FY26 guidance, driven by its Scores segment and FICO Score 10T adoption, suggest a high probability of another rebound, despite potential challenges from increased competition and high valuations. However, the stock is not immune to significant downturns during market volatility, as evidenced by past major drops.

feed.title: American Water Works (AWK) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimat
feed.summary: American Water Works (AWK) exceeded third-quarter earnings expectations with a GAAP EPS of $1.94 and reported a revenue of $1.45 billion, surpassing projections. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.8275 per share, maintaining a forward yield of 2.56%. Analysts remain cautiously optimistic, with a target price of $141.64.

feed.title: PCA to shut down paper machines at Washington containerboard mill
feed.summary: Packaging Corp. of America (PCA) plans to reconfigure its Wallula, Washington containerboard mill by shutting down its No. 2 paper machine and kraft pulping facilities by the end of Q1 2026. This move, impacting 200 workers, aims to reduce production costs by $125 per ton due to challenging and worsening cost environments, particularly high wood fiber and purchased power costs. The mill will transition to a single-machine recycled operation, maintaining 285,000 tons of recycled linerboard and corrugated medium capacity, with PCA planning to replace the 250,000 tons of reduced capacity at other facilities.

feed.title: Multicloud integration strategy connects data to AI
feed.summary: The AI boom is pushing companies towards deeper multicloud integration to connect core data systems with modern AI tools as frictionlessly as possible. Oracle Corp. is seeing strong enthusiasm for multicloud collaboration and AI database efforts, enabling customers to leverage mission-critical data in Oracle databases for AI data pipelines across various cloud platforms, including AWS. This strategy provides consistent, predictable performance regardless of where workloads run.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) Given New $125.00 Price Target at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has lowered its price target for Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) to $125.00 from $130.00, while maintaining an "equal weight" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 10.64% from the stock's current price. Other analysts have also adjusted their targets, with the consensus rating for MHK being a "Moderate Buy" and a target price of $137.62.

feed.title: FDA Clearance Of Lower-Target Omnipod 5 Upgrade Could Be A Game Changer For Insulet (PODD)
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation received FDA clearance for significant enhancements to its Omnipod 5 Automated Insulin Delivery System, introducing a 100 mg/dL target glucose option and improved automation. This upgrade offers greater personalization and consistent automated mode usage for patients, supporting the company's investment narrative amidst competitive pressures. The company aims for a broader rollout in the US in the first half of 2026, reinforcing its strategy to scale a single core platform globally.

feed.title: Chevron to join Nigeria oil licence auction, plans rig deployment in 2026
feed.summary: Chevron announced its intent to participate in Nigeria's upcoming oil licensing round and plans to deploy a drilling rig in late 2026 to expand its operations. The company cited improved regulatory clarity under the Petroleum Industry Act for its decision to grow its footprint in Africa's top energy producer. Chevron also noted zero oil theft or sabotage in its Nigerian operations over the past year, indicating improved security.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Advises on Netflix-Warner Deal in M&A Win for Bank
authors: Matthew Monks and Michelle F Davis
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Co. secured an advisory role in Netflix Inc.'s planned acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc., highlighting the bank's strategy of leveraging its balance sheet to win significant M&A mandates. The bank is contributing a $29.5 billion portion of a $59 billion bridge loan for the deal, which has an enterprise value of approximately $82.7 billion. This marks Wells Fargo's largest ever commitment for an investment-grade bridge facility by a single bank.

feed.title: Diageo, MADD, the NFL and Uber Enter Year Two of ‘Take a Minute. Make a Plan. Never Drive Impaired’
feed.summary: Diageo North America, Mothers Against Drunk Driving (MADD), the National Football League (NFL), and Uber Technologies, Inc. are continuing their "Take a Minute. Make a Plan." campaign for a second year. This initiative encourages fans to plan for a safe ride home before game day to prevent impaired driving. The campaign had significant impact last year, reaching half of the legal drinking age population and resulting in over one million free ride redemptions in December 2024.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial (NYSE:RJF) Shares Rise After Sector Review
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial (NYSE:RJF) shares rose after a sector review. The article provides insight into the company's position within the NYSE Composite and its links to the S&P 500 index, operating within the financial services sector. It also addresses questions about multi-segment structures in financial enterprises and how the sector maintains structural continuity.

feed.title: Ohio McDonald's owner with Filet-O-Fish ties receives chain's top award
feed.summary: Ohio McDonald's franchisee Erica Shadoin, granddaughter of Filet-O-Fish inventor Lou Groen, has received the prestigious Fred L. Turner Golden Arch Award, continuing a family legacy in successful restaurant ownership. Shadoin is among only 40 franchisees to earn this top honor. The Groen family now owns numerous McDonald's locations across Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, with the Filet-O-Fish celebrating over 60 years on the menu.

feed.title: American water declares quarterly dividend of $0.8275 per share
feed.summary: American Water Works Company, Inc. (NYSE:AWK) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.8275 per share, payable on March 3, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 10, 2026. This increases its annual dividend to $3.31 per share, yielding 2.57%. The company recently reported strong Q3 2025 earnings and has been involved in strategic acquisitions and infrastructure investments.

feed.title: Colgate and PETA Science Group Team Up to Sponsor Scientists from India for Non-Animal Toxicity Test Training
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive and PETA Science Consortium International e.V. have sponsored six scientists from India to undergo training in non-animal toxicity testing methods in the U.S. This initiative equips scientists with skills to replace animal use in chemical testing. The Science Consortium has now sponsored over 40 scientists for this program.

feed.title: Bank of America Shares Climb 23.1% YTD: Is It Too Late to Buy?
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) shares have risen 23.1% year-to-date, prompting investors to question if it's still a good time to buy. Strong fundamentals, including projected net interest income growth, an expanding physical and digital network, and a solid liquidity profile, suggest continued upside. Despite concerns about weakening asset quality due to continuous high interest rates, the company's medium-term strategy targets double-digit earnings growth, supported by investments in technology and a share repurchase plan.

feed.title: Who has the best coverage? New FCC data compares Verizon, T-Mobile, AT&T in every state
feed.summary: New data from the Federal Communications Commission allows consumers to compare 4G LTE and 5G coverage from major cell providers like Verizon, T-Mobile, and AT&T. While Verizon leads slightly in 4G LTE coverage nationally, T-Mobile takes the top spot for 5G coverage, with AT&T and Verizon following. The FCC's National Broadband Map provides tools to check specific coverage at any address for various speeds and conditions.

feed.title: Edwards Lifesciences stock hits 52-week high at 87.42 USD
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences (EW) stock reached a new 52-week high of $87.42, marking an 18.43% increase over the past year and reflecting strong investor confidence. Despite a P/E ratio suggesting it might be slightly overvalued, the company maintains a "GOOD" financial health rating and aggressive share buybacks. Analyst price targets have also been raised following the company's annual investor day, indicating a positive outlook for its future performance.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor (ON): Exploring Today’s Valuation After a Recent Share Price Rebound
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor (ON) has seen a recent 9% rebound in its share price over the past month, despite a negative year-to-date return. The company is considered modestly undervalued by some narratives, with a fair value target of $58.70 driven by its investments in silicon carbide and advanced power management solutions. However, others view its current Price-to-Earnings ratio of 69.1 as high compared to the industry average, suggesting potential downside risk.

feed.title: Essex Property Trust (ESS): Is the Recent 11% Slide Creating a 10% Undervaluation Opportunity?
feed.summary: Essex Property Trust (ESS) has seen an 11% stock slide over the past 12 months, contrasting with its 3-year positive return. Despite modest earnings pressure, analysts suggest upside to fair value, with a narrative pointing to ESS being 10.1% undervalued at $286.63 due to anticipated declines in new multifamily supply. However, risks remain from its heavy exposure to Californian markets.

feed.title: Raymond James Adjusts PT on Edwards Lifesciences to $100 From $96, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Raymond James has increased its price target for Edwards Lifesciences to $100 from $96, while reiterating an Outperform rating. This adjustment reflects continued positive sentiment from analysts towards Edwards Lifesciences, following several other firms also modifying their price targets for the medical equipment company.

feed.title: Chevron Approves $2B Gorgon Stage 3 To Boost Australian Gas Supply
feed.summary: Chevron Australia and its Gorgon JV partners have approved a $2 billion Final Investment Decision for the Gorgon Stage 3 project in Western Australia. This project will link the Geryon and Eurytion gas fields to existing infrastructure, aiming to sustain Gorgon's output and support both domestic gas supply and LNG exports. Chevron also recently updated its organic capital expenditure outlook, projecting $18-19 billion for consolidated subsidiaries in 2026.

feed.title: Cruise week report: Carnival drink hack, best cruise lines, passenger overboard, and more!
feed.summary: This weekly roundup covers the latest cruise news, including a Carnival drink hack to avoid paying at private destinations, the sad conclusion of a search for a missing overboard passenger, and insights into the best cruise lines of 2025. It also highlights an MSC Cruises ship becoming a new favorite and compares Carnival and Royal Caribbean experiences.

feed.title: Consolidated Edison (NYSE:ED) Shares Dip After Sector Metrics Review
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison (NYSE:ED) shares have dipped following a structured review within the integrated utilities sector. The review highlights long-range sector characteristics and the company's connections to broader benchmarks, including the S&P 500 Index. This assessment emphasizes the importance of structural indicators due to utilities' extensive operational systems and regulatory environments.

feed.title: Erste Group downgrades Uber stock rating to Hold from Buy
feed.summary: Erste Group has downgraded Uber's stock rating from Buy to Hold, citing expectations of slower operating income growth in the coming year despite strong gross bookings growth and impressive year-to-date returns. Analyst Hans Engel noted that operating income growth next year is expected to be significantly lower, leading to the expectation that Uber shares will move sideways. The firm maintains a positive outlook on Uber's growth trajectory and notes the stock appears slightly undervalued according to InvestingPro.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics buys Texas Pacific Land (TPL) share at $912
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a ten percent owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp (NYSE:TPL), increased its holdings by purchasing 1 share at $912.29. This transaction brings their direct ownership to 1,162,579 shares, despite InvestingPro data suggesting TPL is overvalued with a P/E ratio of 44.85. The company recently missed Q3 2025 earnings expectations and announced a three-for-one stock split effective December 22, 2025, while KeyBanc initiated coverage with an Overweight rating.

feed.title: Costco's Value Strategy Drives Strong November Sales Momentum
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation demonstrated strong sales momentum in November 2025, driven by its value strategy and membership-based model which appeals to value-conscious consumers. The company reported a 6.9% increase in total comparable sales year-over-year, with significant growth in both in-store and e-commerce platforms. This consistent growth, alongside loyal customer retention and competitive pricing, highlights Costco's resilience in varying economic conditions.

feed.title: Is There a Massive Opportunity Ahead for Digital Realty Trust Stock?
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust, a real estate investment trust (REIT) owning over 300 data centers, has underperformed recently due to its facilities not being optimized for AI workloads. However, the company is retrofitting existing centers and building new AI-specific ones, positioning it for potential significant growth in the coming years by leveraging its vast customer base that includes major tech companies. Investors looking for a stable AI play with long-term upside may find Digital Realty Trust an attractive option despite its current status as a "show me" stock.

feed.title: Ex-Dividend Reminder: Harley-Davidson, Ross Stores and Ameren
feed.summary: Harley-Davidson Inc (HOG), Ross Stores Inc (ROST), and Ameren Corp (AEE) are scheduled to trade ex-dividend on December 9, 2025, for their upcoming quarterly dividends. Based on their recent stock prices, shares are expected to trade lower by approximately 0.76% for HOG, 0.23% for ROST, and 0.70% for AEE, reflecting the dividend payout. Investors can examine the dividend history charts for these companies to gauge the stability and potential continuation of their dividends.

feed.title: Public Storage (PSA) Rating Maintained, Price Target Lowered by Mizuho | PSA Stock News
feed.summary: Mizuho analyst Ravi Vaidya maintained a 'Neutral' rating for Public Storage (PSA) but lowered the price target from $310.00 to $285.00, reflecting an 8.06% decrease. This adjustment follows several other analysts who have recently lowered price targets while largely maintaining their ratings, highlighting a cautious outlook for the company. Despite these adjustments, the average target price from 18 analysts suggests a potential upside of 18.97% from the current price, and the consensus recommendation remains "Outperform."

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy completes vast majority of restoration efforts in Carlos and Alexandria
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy announced that it has completed the vast majority of its restoration efforts in Carlos and Alexandria. The company has been working diligently to restore power to affected areas. This update comes as part of broader news regarding CenterPoint Energy's operations and financial performance.

feed.title: Valero Energy Corporation to Release Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Results on January 29, 2026
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO) announced it will release its financial and operational results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025 on Thursday, January 29, 2026, before the market opens. Management will host a conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results, with a live webcast available on the company's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: State Street Corp stock hits all-time high at 122.71 USD
feed.summary: State Street Corp (STT) stock recently hit an all-time high of $122.71, showcasing a strong performance with a 27.46% increase over the past year. InvestingPro data suggests the company is undervalued with a P/E ratio of 12.85, and it has maintained dividend payments for 55 consecutive years. Recent strategic moves include the acquisition of PriceStats, a cooperation agreement with Albilad Capital in Saudi Arabia, and a minority stake in Coller Capital.

feed.title: Insider Unloading: Christopher L Jensen Sells $524K Worth Of NXP Semiconductors Shares
feed.summary: Christopher L Jensen, EVP at NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ: NXPI), sold 2,300 shares worth $524,791 according to a recent SEC filing. The company faces revenue challenges with a -2.37% decline but boasts a high gross margin of 56.32%. NXP Semiconductors's financial valuation metrics, including P/E, P/S, and EV/EBITDA ratios, suggest the stock may be undervalued compared to industry averages.

feed.title: Looking Into ServiceNow Inc's Recent Short Interest
feed.summary: ServiceNow Inc.'s (NYSE: NOW) short interest as a percentage of float has increased by 30.23% since its last report, now standing at 1.68% of available shares. It would take traders 2.22 days to cover their short positions, on average. Despite the increase, ServiceNow's short interest is lower than the average of its peer group, which is 6.15%.

feed.title: Analysts Are Bullish on These Financial Stocks: Marketaxess Holdings (MKTX), Toronto Dominion Bank (TD)
feed.summary: Financial sector analysts have issued bullish sentiments on Marketaxess Holdings (MKTX) and Toronto Dominion Bank (TD). William Blair analyst Jeff Schmitt maintained a Buy rating for Marketaxess Holdings, while Canaccord Genuity analyst Matthew Lee maintained a Buy rating for Toronto Dominion Bank with a C$122.00 price target. The consensus for MKTX is Hold, and for TD is Moderate Buy.

feed.title: Did Rebranding NoMad Las Vegas Into The Reserve Just Shift MGM Resorts International's (MGM) Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has rebranded NoMad Las Vegas as The Reserve at Park MGM, integrating it into Marriott Bonvoy's Autograph Collection by early 2026. This move deepens MGM's collaboration with Marriott and aims to enhance customer acquisition, focusing on improving Strip monetization. However, the investment narrative is balanced against risks like weaker Las Vegas visitation and pricing pressures, with analysts projecting MGM's revenue to reach $18.4 billion and earnings $906.1 million by 2028.

feed.title: Keycorp stock reaches 52-week high at 19.51 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Keycorp (KEY) has reached a 52-week high of $19.51, reflecting a 3.97% growth over the past year. The company recently announced the redemption of senior bank notes, a quarterly cash dividend of $0.205 per share, and a reduction in its prime lending rate to 7.00 percent. Despite a lowered price target from TD Cowen due to M&A risk, the overall trend signals investor confidence and positive future prospects.

feed.title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Earnings Beat Estimates. Why the Stock Is Falling Anyway.
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise reported lower revenue in its server and hybrid cloud divisions for the fiscal fourth quarter, leading to sluggish stock growth this year. Despite beating estimates, shares fell, indicating that AI-related investments are not yet translating into significant returns for the company.

feed.title: Insider Decision: Thurman J Rodgers Offloads $4.37M Worth Of Enphase Energy Stock
feed.summary: Thurman J Rodgers, a Director at Enphase Energy (NASDAQ: ENPH), sold 150,000 shares of the company's stock for a total of $4,369,140, as disclosed in a recent SEC filing. The company shows strong revenue growth of 7.76% and a gross margin of 47.81%, but faces challenges with a high debt-to-equity ratio of 1.22 and below-average EPS. Despite some financial hurdles, valuation metrics suggest the stock might be undervalued.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines says shutdown will cut into 2025 profits
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines has reduced its 2025 operating profit forecast due to the recent U.S. government shutdown and higher fuel prices. The airline now expects earnings before interest and taxes to be around $500 million, down from an earlier projection of $600 million to $800 million. This follows similar impacts reported by Delta Air Lines and Alaska Air Group, as temporary flight cuts at major airports affected the industry.

feed.title: Peering Into Citigroup Inc's Recent Short Interest
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc.'s (NYSE: C) short interest has decreased by 10.3%, with 26.53 million shares sold short, representing 1.48% of its tradable shares. This reduction in short interest could indicate a more bullish sentiment towards the stock among investors. Despite the decline, Citigroup's short interest is still higher than the average of its peer group.

feed.title: State Street Corp stock hits all-time high at 122.71 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: State Street Corp's stock has reached an all-time high of $122.71, driven by a 27.46% increase over the past year and a 28.15% gain in the last six months. The company demonstrates strong performance with a P/E ratio of 12.85, a 2.76% dividend yield, and a 55-year history of dividend payments. Recent strategic moves include the acquisition of PriceStats, a cooperation agreement with Albilad Capital, and a minority stake in Coller Capital.

feed.title: How Hershey remade its iconic holiday ad as an interactive experience
feed.summary: Hershey has modernized its classic 1989 "Holiday Bells" commercial through an interactive experience at Rockefeller Center and across digital platforms. This multichannel campaign, which includes a musical mat and social media activations, aims to deepen consumer engagement with the iconic ad without altering its original charm. The initiative highlights a shift towards content-driven strategies that connect with consumers across various touchpoints.

feed.title: Capital One stock hits all-time high at 232.46 USD
feed.summary: Capital One Financial Corporation's stock reached an all-time high of $232.46, reflecting robust performance with a 25.36% appreciation over the past year and 30.46% year-to-date returns. The company has a market capitalization of $147.24 billion, a "GOOD" financial health rating, and a 31-year history of dividend payments. Recent positive developments include the successful integration of Discover Financial Services, leading to raised price targets from analysts, and a declared quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Attorney General Nessel Demands Full Hearings on DTE Energy's Data Center Deal in Michigan
feed.summary: Michigan Attorney General Dana Nessel is demanding full public hearings on DTE Energy's application to service a new 1.4-gigawatt data center, citing concerns about potential financial impacts on customers and the lack of detailed information from DTE. Nessel alleges DTE is seeking "rubber-stamp approval" for a secret deal, contrasting it with the transparency required from Consumers Energy in a similar case. She aims to ensure proper scrutiny and protect consumers, having already saved Michigan residents over $4 billion through utility interventions.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Given New $354.00 Price Target at The Goldman Sachs Group
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has adjusted its price target for JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) to $354.00, down from $355.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating. This adjustment indicates a potential upside of 11.66% from the current stock price. Other analysts have also recently updated their price targets and ratings for JPM, with the stock holding an average rating of "Hold" and an average price target of $325.81 across various firms.

feed.title: Lennox (NYSE: LII) sets $1.30 dividend and 2026 annual meeting date
feed.summary: Lennox (NYSE: LII) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.30 per share, which will be payable on January 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 31, 2025. The company also announced that its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders is scheduled for May 21, 2026, with a record date of March 26, 2026.

feed.title: Lennox Declares Quarterly Dividend and Announces Annual Meeting
feed.summary: Lennox International Inc. (NYSE: LII) announced that its board of directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $1.30 per share of common stock, payable on January 15, 2026, to stockholders of record as of December 31, 2025. The company also scheduled its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders for May 21, 2026, with a record date of March 26, 2026.

feed.title: This Albemarle Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Upgrades For Friday
feed.summary: Five top Wall Street analysts have upgraded their ratings for several companies. Albemarle (ALB), AES Corp (AES), MP Materials Corp (MP), Humana Inc (HUM), and Commercial Metals Co (CMC) all received upgrades and increased price targets from various firms including Argus Research, Morgan Stanley, Jefferies, UBS, and JP Morgan.
